name: arc-story-queue
description: Kanban board + MCP server that queues stories and feeds them to live Claude Code sessions, orchestrated by Fable (arc-orchestrator).

scripts.build: npm run build -w arc-contracts && npm run build -w story-queue-mcp
scripts.fable:pull: npm run build && node mcp-server/dist/fable-pull-loop.js pull
scripts.fable:update: npm run build && node mcp-server/dist/fable-pull-loop.js update
scripts.fable:complete: npm run build && node mcp-server/dist/fable-pull-loop.js complete
scripts.test: npm run build && node --experimental-sqlite ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run && npm test -w arc-story-queue-app
